title: UAE extends distance learning till April 17; Ministry confirms schools and universities to remain online
summary_full: The UAE has extended distance learning for all educational institutions until April 17, 2026, impacting millions of students. This decision, announced by the Ministry of Education, prioritizes safety while maintaining learning continuity through digital platforms. The situation will be reviewed weekly, with potential revisions to the reopening timeline.
